title: Phase 38 — Notifications pull-to-refresh + haptic on create/send

stories.title: NotificationsScreenInline: add pull-to-refresh
stories.description:
NotificationsScreenInline in app/ProfileScreen.tsx (around line 737) loads notifications once via useEffect but has no pull-to-refresh. Add the standard pattern: refreshing state, loadNotifications(isRefresh) function with useCallback, RefreshControl on FlatList with tintColor='#EFBF04'.

Note: The FlatList is inside a conditional render (loading ? ... : notifications.length === 0 ? ... : <FlatList>). RefreshControl should be on the FlatList prop. Also convert the empty state to show even when refreshing (so user can still pull-to-refresh from empty state).
acceptance: NotificationsScreenInline has refreshing state and loadNotifications(isRefresh) with useCallback
FlatList has refreshControl prop with tintColor='#EFBF04'
Initial load shows ActivityIndicator, pull-to-refresh does not show full-screen spinner
No other changes to ProfileScreen outside NotificationsScreenInline

stories.title: ExerciseCreatorModal: haptic on successful create
stories.description: handleCreate() in components/workout/ExerciseCreatorModal.tsx calls createExercise() on success but gives no haptic feedback. Add hapticSuccess() after the successful API call (before calling onCreated()).

stories.title: GroupChatTab: haptic on message send
stories.description: handleSend() in components/social/GroupChatTab.tsx sends a message via sendMessage() but gives no haptic feedback. Add hapticImpact() (light/medium) after successfully sending the message (after setSending(false) or at start of try block).
acceptance: hapticImpact() called on successful message send
